subject: Two robed humanoid figures jointly holding a large Greek-style ceramic amphora that emits a radiant golden orb of divine light, with small blue star-sparkles on the figures and swirling magical energy trails above
description: Two humanoid figures dressed in flowing blue-white robes face each other as they jointly carry a large ceramic amphora painted in Greek black-figure style with chevron banding. From the mouth of the vessel rises a blazing golden orb surrounded by curling arcs of magical energy, casting warm light across both figures. Small blue star-like sparkles are scattered across the figures and the air around them, consistent with the Theros constellation-magic aesthetic. The composition is a slightly elevated angle looking down on the pair in close-to-mid range. The background is a muted blue-grey atmospheric haze that keeps focus on the vessel and its light. The mood is ceremonial and reverent — these are attendants in the act of presenting or carrying a sacred object rather than combatants.
foreground: Two robed figures carrying a large decorated amphora emitting a golden magical orb
background: Muted blue-grey atmospheric haze, indeterminate space
emotion: Focused reverence; both figures direct their attention toward the glowing vessel with purposeful composure
